basic_details.job_title: NBRC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Brain Research Centre (NBRC) Recruitment 2026: National Brain Research Centre has released the official notification for 1 Research Assistant -I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid research jobs.

application_fee.all_fee: ₹200 Demand Draft Favour Director, NBRC, Manesar

qualification.education_qualification: MSc in life Sciences with first class
qualification.details: Research Assistant -I: MSc in life Sciences with first class. Candidates with experience in physiology and cell biology with additional skill set in cell culture, CRISPR, mice handling will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NBRC Research Assistant -I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nbrc.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.national_brain_research_centre_nbrc: MSc in life Sciences with first class

content_sections.heading: NBRC Research Assistant -I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NBRC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NBRC Research Assistant -I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NBRC Research Assistant -I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Research Assistant -I: MSc in life Sciences with first class. Candidates with experience in physiology and cell biology with additional skill set in cell culture, CRISPR, mice handling will be preferred.

rows.fee: ₹200 Demand Draft Favour Director, NBRC, Manesar

content_sections.heading: NBRC Research Assistant -I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last date for receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NBRC Research Assistant -I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.nbrc.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NBRC Research Assistant -I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NBRC Research Assistant -I position?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Research Assistant -I post at NBRC is 09 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant -I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc in life Sciences with first class to be eligible for the Research Assistant -I position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant -I post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Assistant -I position is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant -I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant -I post will receive a salary of ₹25,000.00 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NBRC Research Assistant -I recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline by post to the Administrative Officer (Academics), National Brain Research Centre, Nainwal Mode, Gurugram-122052 (Haryana).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, an application fee of ₹200 is required in the form of a Demand Draft favouring Director, NBRC, Manesar.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant -I post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Acad./07/2026.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job opportunity at the National Brain Research Centre.

faq.question: Q10. Which city is NBRC located in?
faq.answer: The National Brain Research Centre (NBRC) is located in Gurugram, Haryana.
